# Clarence Williams

> Business & management consulting site for Clarence Williams — a Vistage
> Chair based in Alpharetta, GA. Covers business consulting, software
> delivery leadership, and brand & marketing guidance for founders and
> executive teams. The site also hosts two free self-assessment tools and
> a resume-request flow for executive search inquiries.

Primary audience: founders, executives, and business owners evaluating
consulting engagements, Vistage peer-group membership, or executive
coaching, plus recruiters and hiring teams requesting Clarence's resume.

## Primary pages

- [Home](/): overview of Clarence Williams' consulting practice, service
  pillars, proof points, and how to book an introductory call.
- [Services](/services): the three consulting pillars — business
  consulting, software delivery leadership, and brand & marketing.
- [About](/about): background, credentials, and bio.
- [Author](/author): Clarence Williams' published book(s) and author bio.
- [Resume](/resume): recruiter-facing page for requesting Clarence's
  resume for executive search consideration.

## Assessments

- [Agility Assessment](/assessment/agility): a free self-assessment that
  scores an organization's operational agility and returns a tiered
  recommendation.
- [Business Health Assessment](/assessment/business-health): a free
  self-assessment that scores overall business health and returns a
  tiered recommendation.

## Other resources

- [Sitemap](/api/sitemap.xml): the full list of published pages and
  active assessments, with last-modified dates.

Note: additional marketing pages may be published or unpublished by the
site owner over time — see the sitemap above for the current canonical
list of crawlable public routes.
